title: Choose a Healthy Animal
description: Ensure the animal is free from illness, injury, or visible defects.

title: Meet Age Requirements
description: Goats/sheep should be at least 1 year old, cows 2 years, camels 5 years.

title: Buy from Trusted Sellers
description: Purchase from reliable farms to ensure proper care and authenticity.

title: Buy from Trusted Sellers
name: Boer Goat
description: Large size and high-quality meat make it a popular choice.

title: Buy from Trusted Sellers
name: Sahiwal Cow
description: Known for adaptability and good meat production.
